content.problemStatement:
You are given an array of integers AAA formed by concatenating the identity permutation of length NNN exactly KKK times.

For given positive integers a,b,ca, b, ca,b,c and ddd, the score SSS of a sequence [s1,s2,‚Ä¶,sl][s_{1}, s_{2}, \ldots , s_{l}][s1‚Äč,s2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,sl‚Äč] is defined as :

S=(g+a)√ó(g+b)(l+c)√ó(l+d)S = \frac{(g + a) \times (g + b)}{(l + c) \times (l + d)}S=(l+c)√ó(l+d)(g+a)√ó(g+b)‚Äč

where ggg denotes the GCD of the sequence and  lll denotes the length of the sequence.

Find the sum of score of all subsequences of the array AAA modulo 998244353998244353998244353.

Formally, let M=998244353M = 998244353M=998244353. It can be shown that the answer can be expressed as an irreducible fraction PQ\frac{P}{Q}QP‚Äč, where PPP and QQQ are integers and Q‚Č°Őł0(modM)Q \not\equiv 0 \pmod{M}QÓÄ†‚Č°0(modM). Output the integer equal to
P‚čÖQ‚ąí1mod‚ÄČ‚ÄČMP\cdot Q^{‚ąí1} \mod{M}P‚čÖQ‚ąí1modM. In other words, output such an integer xxx that 0‚Č§x<M0\leq x < M 0‚Č§x<M and x‚čÖQ‚Č°P(modM).x \cdot Q \equiv P\pmod{M}.x‚čÖQ‚Č°P(modM).

**Note** :


A permutation of NNN elements is an array of length NNN containing each integer from 111 to NNN exactly once. An identity permutation of length NNN is the sequence [1,2,3,‚Ä¶,N][1, 2, 3, \ldots, N][1,2,3,‚Ä¶,N].
The GCD of a sequence of positive integers is the largest integer that divides all the integers in the array.
A sequence xxx is a subsequence of a sequence yyy if xxx can be obtained from yyy by deletion of several (possibly, zero or all) elements.

Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK.
The next line of each test case contains four space-separated integers a,b,ca, b, ca,b,c and ddd.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the sum of score of all subsequences of the array AAA modulo 998244353998244353998244353.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 2‚čÖ1052\cdot10^52‚čÖ105.
The sum of ddd over all test cases won't exceed 200020002000.
